summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TaskFlow task tracker app - all core functionality working correctly

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for task creation
minor_issues.impact: Minor - functionality works but HTTP status code is incorrect

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Google login buttons
Backend task CRUD operations (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE /api/tasks)
Mock authentication with MongoDB test user and session
Daily progress cells are editable and functional
Subtask page opens and displays correctly
Task grid layout and responsive design

success_percentage.backend: 94% (15/16 tests passed - 1 minor HTTP status code issue)
